purpose: Deterministic live-swarm telemetry heatmap contract for operator-readable pressure snapshots, bounded hotspot rows, stale proof warnings, and Agent Mail safe handoff text.

proof_lane.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_fifth_wave_live_swarm_telemetry_heatmap CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test fifth_wave_live_swarm_telemetry_heatmap_contract -- --nocapture
does_not_cover: does not prove live RCH fleet availability
does not implement a production dashboard
does not prove broad observability correctness
does not prove broad workspace health
does not authorize local Cargo fallback

fixture_catalog.summary: Small quiescent swarm run with nominal lock and scheduler metrics.
Bounded high queue-depth and lock wait rows route to scheduler and sync owners without claiming performance regression.
Cancellation-heavy replay evidence remains compact and routes cancellation or region hotspots without leaking secrets.
Fresh trace rows with an expired comparison baseline produce stale_evidence instead of a green pass.

failure_fixtures.expected_reason: proof lane must stay remote-required and refuse local fallback
Agent Mail text and routing hints must not contain secret-like tokens
heatmap artifact cannot claim production dashboard, broad health, or fleet availability

operator_interpretation.notes: pass only means the focused heatmap snapshot had required fields, a fresh baseline, and no warning-or-critical hotspot rows.
warning and critical rows route operators to likely owners; they are not benchmark evidence.
true forces stale_evidence even when hotspot rows are otherwise healthy.
hints must remain deterministic, bounded, and safe to paste into Agent Mail.

non_claims: does not prove live RCH fleet availability
does not implement a production dashboard
does not prove broad observability correctness
does not prove broad workspace health
does not authorize local Cargo fallback
does not create branches, worktrees, scratch clones, or non-main refs
does not modify runtime scheduler policy
closeout_requirements: Focused remote RCH proof for fifth_wave_live_swarm_telemetry_heatmap_contract must pass from clean main.
Closeout may cite this artifact only for heatmap schema, bounded cardinality, redaction boundary, stale evidence mapping, and operator handoff fields.
Any broad dashboard, fleet availability, performance, no-regression, or release-readiness claim requires a separate proof lane.
